lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you then?

lines.speaker: Trainer Nacklepen
lines.text: Hurumph.

lines.speaker: Trainer Nacklepen
lines.text: Nacklepen, tortoise trainer extraordinaire.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's extraordinary about you?

lines.speaker: Trainer Nacklepen
lines.text: Do you know any other tortoise trainers?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, no.

lines.speaker: Trainer Nacklepen
lines.text: Well there you go then.

lines.speaker: Trainer Nacklepen
lines.text: Tortoises are naturally pacifistic animals that eat nothing but cabbages. I am required to beat those peaceful tendencies out of the softies and turn them into hardened battle-trained killers.

lines.speaker: Trainer Nacklepen
lines.text: Firstly I acclimatise them to excessive aural stimulation and simple physical confrontation.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You shout at them and beat them with sticks?

lines.speaker: Trainer Nacklepen
lines.text: Of course. Then I re-educate them to become comfortable with riders and military combat situations.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You sit on their backs and prod them with sharp pointy things.

lines.speaker: Trainer Nacklepen
lines.text: If you like.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Doesn't seem very fair on the tortoises.

lines.speaker: Trainer Nacklepen
lines.text: This is War! Fairness is a luxury of the weak.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmmm, profound but disturbing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So why tortoises?

lines.speaker: Trainer Nacklepen
lines.text: Isn't it obvious? Surely even to your untrained eye that giant tortoises are the perfect mobile armoured field unit?

lines.speaker: Trainer Nacklepen
lines.text: They are sturdy animals, and well protected by their shell. They can even swim! All we need to do is put a bit of fire in their bellies.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I suppose so....

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where do these tortoises come from?

lines.speaker: Trainer Nacklepen
lines.text: We breed them. The originals were found by gnome explorers back in King Healthorg the Great's rule. On their discovery King Healthorg authorised a small party to go there and transport a breeding pair back here. He

lines.speaker: Trainer Nacklepen
lines.text: kept one for himself to ride into battle.

lines.speaker: Trainer Nacklepen
lines.text: Trouble is they take a lot of skill and time to breed, so we're only just getting them battle ready.

lines.speaker: Trainer Nacklepen
lines.text: Huzzah!
